title: Prepare to receive grains and seeds
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare to receive grains and seeds demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to work safely

pcs.text: Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls in the grain handling facility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls in the grain handling facility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards, assess risk and implement controls in the grain handling facility.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety procedures.
